title: Steam Game Recommendation System
description: Built a hybrid recommendation system for Steam games using metadata, review statistics, collaborative filtering, matrix factorization, and learning-to-rank models to personalize game suggestions.

title: Book Recommendation and Genre Prediction System
description: Built an end-to-end machine learning pipeline to predict user book ratings and classify review genres, combining collaborative filtering (bias-aware and latent factor models) with TF-IDF text features and logistic regression, and applying validation splits, hyperparameter tuning, and early stopping to improve model accuracy and generalization.

title: Temperature-Driven Mice Activity Visualization
description: Built an interactive data visualization to analyze how temperature influences mice's daily activity patterns, implementing dynamic view toggles and animation controls to explore behavioral shifts across thermal conditions and model time-series relationships.

title: Bike Traffic Visualization
description: An interactive map visualization that combines Mapbox and D3.js to show Boston’s bike lane infrastructure and Bluebikes station traffic. Users can explore patterns in arrivals and departures across stations, filter activity by time of day using a slider, and see traffic flow visualized through circle size and color.

title: 3D Hospital Visualization
description: Developed an interactive 3D hospital environment using D3.js and GLTF models to visualize patient journeys across clinical spaces, integrating condition-based navigation and responsive spatial controls to enhance user exploration.

title: Environmental Expenditures and Climate Readiness
description: Compared data visualizations supporting opposing positions on the relationship between a government's annual environmental expenditure and a country's climate readiness.

title: Calorie Impact on Recipe Ratings
description: Exploring the relationship between nutrients and ratings in food recipes offers invaluable insights for both health-conscious individuals and culinary enthusiasts.

title: N-Gram language Model
description: Built and analyzed language models by dissecting a text corpus, implementing uniform and unigram models, and creating an N-gram model for probability computation and text generation.

title: Loan Applications
description: Explored how various borrower characteristics are related to one another, in an attempt to better understand the complexity behind loans.

title: MTS Bus Transit Network Analysis
description: Conducted a detailed analysis of the bus transit network, allowing for visualization of routes, optimization of travel times, and understanding of transit patterns.

title: Image Transformations
description: Implemented core image processing functionality in Python, including brightness adjustment, rotation, blurring, and K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) classification of images based on pixel similarity.

title: The Great British Bake Off Analysis
description: Analyzed the Great British Bake Off dataset to explore the relationship between contestants' characteristics and their success in the competition.

title: Taylor Swift Analysis and Reccommendation Tool
description: Developed data visualizations, a song recommendation engine, lyric search functionality, and keyword analysis for Taylor Swift’s discography.
